mapper.select: select source_path as sourcePath, content_hash as contentHash, chunk_count as chunkCount, status from ai_document_index where source_path = #{sourcePath} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into ai_document_index ( id, source_path, file_name, content_hash, chunk_count, status, error_message, indexed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{sourcePath}, #{fileName}, #{contentHash}, #{chunkCount}, 'SUCCESS', null, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0 ) on duplicate key update file_name = values(file_name), content_hash = values(content_hash), chunk_count = values(chunk_count), status = 'SUCCESS', error_message = null, indexed_at = current_timestamp, updated_at = current_timestamp, deleted = 0

insert into ai_document_index ( id, source_path, file_name, content_hash, chunk_count, status, error_message, indexed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) values ( #{id}, #{sourcePath}, #{fileName}, #{contentHash}, 0, 'FAILED', #{errorMessage}, null, current_timestamp, current_timestamp, 0 ) on duplicate key update file_name = values(file_name), content_hash = values(content_hash), status = 'FAILED', error_message = values(error_message), updated_at = current_timestamp, deleted = 0
